title: Wild Fields
description: This mod adds new expansive biomes to the game, featuring wild open landscapes that bring more diversity and beauty to your world.
body:
Explore the untamed beauty of vast open landscapes with my new biome expansion mod! 

![Mod Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/805f0e804a2b3d360a8372dad96319c970d6628f.jpeg)

This mod brings a variety of expansive and immersive biomes designed to enhance your Minecraft experience. Whether you’re wandering through endless grasslands, crossing frozen tundras, or marveling at the serene beauty of windswept prairies, you’ll find an exciting new world waiting to be discovered.

If you wanna more interesting stuff you can check out my other mods.

[![Arboreal Nature link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb219391aa8cf79057f2c736395e069ed3382279.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/arboreal-nature)
[![Jam & Jelly link](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1133928/description_4a57ed46-7a8c-452d-b4dc-4e35ec16afae.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jam-jelly)
[![Aesthetic Seating link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e12aa9643912496a675d17b7a88b1692f01924e1.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/aesthetic-seating)

[![Ko-fi link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd32bda2dbe27a0b4100056a8e7f54e83e98f7fc.png)](https://ko-fi.com/almiris)
[![Patreon link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e95a1a4d85b20de6b1f942286f9b43793d1c6dc.png)](https://www.patreon.com/c/Almiris)
[![CurseForge link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e13c79f563423cc2402a14b79f9cbe456020321.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wild-fields)

Every X.0.0 update will bring into the game new biome. And some of 0.X.0 updates can contain the expansions of existed open wild biomes like plains, savanna, sparse jungles, etc. There are  Steppes Biome, Prairies Biome and Expanded Plains at the moment.

![Prairies Biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1b6f84a421f922af07ff33cba2048226f4f36c1.jpeg)

![Expanded Plains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb7f17c5404cb26e561018ae875845b95bcac97f.jpeg)

![Steppes Biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b8c1fd439ceed283a98e8109977e8f267208a6b.jpeg)

## Features:
- New Biomes: Adds a range of expansive biomes inspired by real-world open landscapes.
Unique Flora and Fauna: Each biome features custom vegetation, wildlife, and environmental details.
- Dynamic Exploration: Experience seamless transitions between biomes, each with distinct terrain, climate, and resources.
- Enhanced Atmosphere: Enjoy stunning visuals and ambient sounds that bring each biome to life.
- Compatibility: Fully compatible with existing worlds and other popular mods.

## Future Plans
- Adding more biomes: Prairies, Pampasas, Tundra, etc
- Adding biome specific villages
- Adding more interesting mobs, trees, plants, food, mechanics and other unique biome related stuff
